headline: Ulta and Tapestry CEOs on strategy, retail and gen-z shift
summary: Kecia Steelman’s rise to CEO of Ulta Beauty in January 2025 is a quintessential "climb to the top" story, rooted in resilience and operational expertise. Since taking the CEO helm, Steelman has launched the "Ulta Beauty Unleashed" strategy, focusing on international expansion into the U.K., Mexico, and the Middle East, while overseeing a workforce that is 91% female. Ulta's shares are up 57% over the past year. Steelman stepped up to the Opening Bid Unfiltered podcast mic with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi to chat about the business of beauty. Sticking with retail, Joanne Crevoiserat has emerged as one of the most successful leaders in modern luxury retail, transforming Tapestry through a disciplined focus on brand building, digital innovation, and consumer engagement. Since becoming CEO in 2020, she has helped guide the company through the COVID-19 pandemic and a rapidly changing retail landscape while strengthening its portfolio of brands, including Coach and Kate Spade New York. Crevoiserat sat down with Brian to discuss her tenure as CEO and what's next for the company.

headline: Tapestry CEO on shaping brand loyalty
summary: Tapestry CEO, Joanne Crevoiserat, sits down with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor, Brian Sozzi, to unpack the emotional power behind a consumer’s “first luxury buy.” From the nostalgia of a first Coach bag to the psychology of brand loyalty, Crevoiserat explains why that initial purchase is more than just a transaction—it’s a defining moment.

headline: A Look At Tapestry (TPR) Valuation After Blocked Capri Deal And US$1.5b Capital Return Plan
summary: Tapestry (TPR) is back in focus after the blocked Capri Holdings deal, with management committing to a US$1.5b capital return plan, including US$1.2b in buybacks, funded by a luxury brand portfolio built around Coach. See our latest analysis for Tapestry. The recent 1 year total shareholder return of 127.41% and 3 year total shareholder return of 273.17% stand out against a more measured 9.40% year to date share price return. This suggests momentum has cooled slightly after a strong multi...

headline: Deckers' Strong Capital Position & Buybacks Strengthen Growth Outlook
summary: DECK's $2.1B cash reserve, debt-free balance sheet and accelerated buybacks reinforce its growth outlook and signal confidence in future earnings strength.

headline: Tapestry, Inc. Appoints Matt Madrigal to Board of Directors
summary: NEW YORK, April 06, 2026--Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE: TPR), a house of iconic accessories and lifestyle brands, today announced that Matt Madrigal, Chief Technology Officer of Pinterest, Inc. (NYSE: PINS), has been appointed to the Company’s Board of Directors effective immediately. The appointment of Mr. Madrigal brings the Board’s membership to eleven, including ten independent directors.

content.title: Tapestry, Inc. Appoints Matt Madrigal to Board of Directors
content.summary: NEW YORK, April 06, 2026--Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE: TPR), a house of iconic accessories and lifestyle brands, today announced that Matt Madrigal, Chief Technology Officer of Pinterest, Inc. (NYSE: PINS), has been appointed to the Company’s Board of Directors effective immediately. The appointment of Mr. Madrigal brings the Board’s membership to eleven, including ten independent directors.
